input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36/reviews" --jq '.[] | select(.user.login != "gemini-code-assist[bot]") | {user: .user.login, state: .state, body: .body}'

REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh pr view 36 --json reviews,comments,title,body --jq '{title, reviews: [.reviews[] | {author: .author.login, state: .state, body: .body}], comments: [.comments[] | {author: .author.login, body: .body}]}'

There's nothing actionable here — the PR looks ready to merge.
